meaning: 埃里温[亚美尼亚共和国首都]
examples: In 1813 and 1828, present-day Armenia (consisting of the Erivan and Karabakh khanates) was temporarily incorporated into the Russian Empire.
Time off: Last fall St Joseph's University in Philadelphia dedicated the Erivan K. Haub School of Business to Haub, 65, a longtime benefactor.
